title: `Amacyah #6007
definition:
Amasiah = "Jehovah is strength"

 1) son of Zichri and captain of 200,000 warriors of Judah in the
    reign of king Jehoshaphat of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Amasiah = "Jehovah is strength"

 1) son of Zichri and captain of 200,000 warriors of Judah in the
    reign of king Jehoshaphat of Judah

    NASB:  Yah has loaded, a man of Judah
